title: UN cuts estimates of women, children deaths in Gaza war in half
shortDescription: The United Nations reduced by half the number of women and children estimated to have been killed during Israel's war in Gaza.

title: 'Psychological torture': JD Vance attends Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Ohio Senator and Donald Trump ally J.D. Vance attended the criminal hush money trial Monday. He defended 'Sleepy Don' and criticized Michael Cohen.

title: Donald Trump leads Joe Biden in 5 pivotal swing states, new poll finds
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is leading President Joe Biden in five key swing states, a new poll found.

title: Actress Eva Longoria to campaign for Biden in Phoenix
shortDescription: The Desperate Housewives actress's visit will focus on rallying Latinas behind the president.

title: A guilty verdict? Trump braces voters for the worst | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Israel continues its strikes on Rafah, while U.S. officials speak out about civilian deaths in Gaza and weapons to Israel. More on The Excerpt.

title: Will ballot drop boxes be legal in Wisconsin? Court to hear arguments.
shortDescription: The Wisconsin state Supreme Court ruled drop boxes illegal in 2022. But that could change with a case before the court's new liberal majority.

title: Donald Trump (once again) praises fictional serial killer at rally
shortDescription: "The late, great Hannibal Lecter," former President Donald Trump said during a rally Saturday in New Jersey.

title: Donald Trump fixer Michael Cohen is center stage at hush-money trial
shortDescription: Cohen's prior testimony, and court documents, suggest he'll be the linchpin of DA Alvin Bragg's illegal payments prosecution of former president.

title: Trump trial updates: Michael Cohen testifies as star witness
shortDescription: Follow along on the latest updates from Donald Trump's hush money trial as Michael Cohen testifies on Monday in New York.

title: He went to prison for Jan. 6. Now he's running for Congress.
shortDescription: Derrick Evans resigned as state lawmaker and apologized for raiding the Capitol in 2020. Now, he holds up his conviction as the ultimate MAGA credential.

title: Bob Menendez's Senate colleagues don't want to talk about his trial
shortDescription: The senior senator from New Jersey is accused of taking bribes in exchange for helping businessmen and foreign governments.

title: Jimmy Carter voted in 2024 Georgia primary election, his grandson says
shortDescription: “He’s not going to miss an election.” Jason Carter said. “It’s important to him. I mean, that’s the person he is.”

title: Top Trump allies Vance, Graham say they will accept 2024 election results
shortDescription: Senators J.D. Vance and Lindsey Graham say they will accept the 2024 election results, a position that separates them from other top Republicans

title: Trump attacks Biden, sweeping criminal charges at raucous New Jersey rally
shortDescription: Trump held a large rally on the beach in Wildwood, New Jersey, and claimed the deep blue state is in play.

title: See paper trail, photo evidence from last week in Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Stormy Daniels and former Trump aides testified in the hush money criminal trial. See the photos, documents and books lawyers used as evidence.

title: Trump rules out Nikki Haley as VP pick: ‘Wish her well.’
shortDescription: Trump said Haley isn't under consideration for vice president on his Truth Social platform on Saturday.
